terms.definition: Clothing, outfit, or costume. It refers to the clothes or dress a person wears. Poshak can be simple or fancy depending on the occasion.
terms.exampleUsage: उसने बहुत सुंदर पोशाक पहनी थी। (He/She wore a very beautiful outfit.)

terms.definition: A friend - someone you care about and who cares about you. A true friend (सच्चा दोस्त) accepts you as you are, regardless of appearances.
terms.exampleUsage: मेरा दोस्त बहुत अच्छा इंसान है। (My friend is a very good person.)

terms.definition: Respect or honour - treating someone with dignity and regard. Every person deserves sammaan regardless of how they look or dress.
terms.exampleUsage: हमें सबका सम्मान करना चाहिए। (We should respect everyone.)

terms.definition: Disrespect or insult - treating someone in a way that hurts their dignity. It is the opposite of sammaan. No one should face apmaan because of their appearance.
terms.exampleUsage: किसी का अपमान करना गलत है। (It is wrong to disrespect anyone.)

terms.definition: Showing off or pretence based on outward appearance. It means judging or valuing something only by how it looks on the outside, not by its true worth.
terms.exampleUsage: दिखावे पर मत जाओ, असली गुण पहचानो। (Do not go by appearances, recognise true qualities.)

terms.definition: Friendship - the bond of love, trust, and care between friends. True dosti does not depend on money, clothes, or looks.
terms.exampleUsage: सच्ची दोस्ती में कपड़ों का कोई मतलब नहीं। (In true friendship, clothes do not matter.)

terms.definition: A feast or banquet - a special gathering where food is served to guests. In the story, the friend attends a daavat where he is treated differently based on his clothes.
terms.exampleUsage: दावत में सबके लिए अच्छा खाना बना था। (Good food was prepared for everyone at the feast.)

terms.definition: Qualities or virtues - the good characteristics that make a person who they really are. Goon are more important than clothes or outward appearance.
terms.exampleUsage: इंसान की पहचान उसके गुणों से होती है। (A person is recognised by their qualities.)

terms.definition: A guest - someone who visits another person's home or event. In Indian culture, guests are treated with great respect (अतिथि देवो भव - a guest is like God).
terms.exampleUsage: हमें हर मेहमान का स्वागत करना चाहिए। (We should welcome every guest.)

terms.definition: Simplicity - being plain and modest without showing off. Saadgi in clothes or behaviour shows that a person values inner qualities over outer appearances.
terms.exampleUsage: सादगी में भी सुंदरता होती है। (There is beauty in simplicity too.)
